automation.title: Execution-to-billing automation
automation.description: When Work Order or Schedule reaches a final execution status, the backend can automatically create a finance entry. NF-e issuance is optional.

workOrder.label: Work order
workOrder.description: Allows billing and NF-e issuance from work orders.

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.description: Allows billing and NF-e issuance from schedule completions.

finance.label: Finance
finance.description: Enables fiscal issuance for finance entries.

inventory.label: Inventory
inventory.description: Reserved for sales that trigger stock reduction.

people.label: People
people.description: Reserved for billing based on services delivered by collaborators.

clients.label: Clients
clients.description: Reserved for sales flows initiated in the Clients module.

issuance.title: Fiscal issuance connection (NF-e)
issuance.subtitle: Configure workspace fiscal issuer settings for service-sale invoices.

advanced.title: Advanced parameters

theme.alertDescription: The selected mode is applied immediately and saved to your local preferences.
